testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.auth.jwt.JwtAuthenticationFilterTest

testcase.name: token signed with a different secret is rejected()
malformed token is rejected and SecurityContext stays empty()
missing Authorization header leaves SecurityContext empty()
valid Bearer token populates SecurityContext with AdvertiserPrincipal and ROLE_ADVERTISER()
Bearer prefix with empty token is treated as no token()
non-Bearer scheme is ignored and SecurityContext stays empty()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:28.806+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.auth.jwt.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Rejected JWT on path /api/protected: JWT signature does not match locally computed signature. JWT validity cannot be asserted and should not be trusted. 2026-05-02T23:50:28.807+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.auth.jwt.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Rejected JWT on path /api/protected: Invalid compact JWT string: Compact JWSs must contain exactly 2 period characters, and compact JWEs must contain exactly 4. Found: 0 2026-05-02T23:50:28.808+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.auth.jwt.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Authenticated request advertiserId=adv-42 path=/api/protected
